para_trans: The amount for Ambernath Municipal Council, District Thane under Head of Accounts (4217 0603) for the year 2024-25 is Rs. 25.00 Crores (purse)
Government Correctional Certificate No: - NABARD-2024 / Q. No.246 (C-73) / NABARD-16 (E-828269)
(1) Department of Urban Development, Government Decision No: - NABARD-2024 / P.No.246 (C-73) / NABARD-16, (E-828269) dated 15th October, 2024.
Municipal councils in the state are given special grants for "specialty" work.
Reference No. (1) The Government hereby orders the commencement of work at A.No. 1, 3 and 4.
If not, cancel and replace the said works subject to the condition that there is a time limit for the expenditure of funds.
The works in the accompanying returns are being approved through this Government Certification.
Also referred to as No. (1) The Municipal Council shall be the executive body for the functions of the Government.
The "Public Works Department" will remain instead.
2. Reference No. (1) The other terms and conditions of the Government decision herein shall continue.
3. This Government Corrigendum is the www.maharashtra.gov.in of the Government of Maharashtra.
